Package tk.artsakenos.ultrahttp.drupal

Class DrupalClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • tk.artsakenos.ultrahttp.Client
      • tk.artsakenos.ultrahttp.drupal.DrupalClient
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    DrupalMapper
    public class DrupalClient
extends Client
    Author:
    Andrea Nota: estendendo il toJsonNode() del DrupalNode, poi si può chiamare direttamente l'edit dal client.
